name: Snow Drift Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crushed cookies and margarine. Press onto the bottom of a round 9-inch glass or plastic pan.
2. Rotate the pan midway through cooking; microwave on high for 2 minutes.
3. In a large glass mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and chocolate. Stirring midway through cooking time, microwave on 50% power for 4 minutes, or until the cheese is softened and chocolate is melted.
4. Add eggs and beat with an electric mixer or whisk.
5. Add 3/4 cup sugar and 1 tablespoon of liqueur; mix well.
6. Pour over prepared crust.
7. Rotate the cheesecake a quarter turn after every 3 minutes, microwaving on 70% power for 10-12 minutes, or until the center jiggles only slightly.
8. Combine sour cream with remaining sugar and liqueur and spread over top of cheesecake.
9. Microwave on 70% power for 1 minute. Let cool and refrigerate. Garnish top with dark chocolate shavings. Makes 9-10 servings.
